---
title: "Letters from Mrs. Elizabeth Carter, to Mrs. Montagu, between the years 1755 and 1800"
---

## Letters from Mrs. Elizabeth Carter, to Mrs. Montagu, between the years 1755 and 1800

**Author:** Montagu Pennington
**Date:** 1817
**Imprint:** London: Rivington

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
